segments.text: Hello?
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Yes?
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Can I speak to Patel Vimlabeen?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Patel Vimlabeen. Are you a doctor speaking?
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Yes, I am Doctor Parita. Tata AIE Life Insurance.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay, she hasn't come today. She has gone to the village today. She is our relative. I don't have her number, so I can't call.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: So today... you can give me your number, and I can call your number.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, these are system-generated calls. So you can't make calls on this number.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: You give me a time, I will call back then.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, actually, what is it? She is at work in the village. On working days, she is at work.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: No, today is Sunday, right? So what time will she come today?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: She has gone to the village. When she comes... Okay, that's how it is.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: She is not coming today or today not?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Oh, she has gone to the village. What can I tell you? There is a custom in the village. So they are there.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Still, do one thing for me. Call around 5:30, exactly. If she has arrived, I will make you talk to her.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay, okay, alright. 5:30.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Call me exactly at 5:30, madam.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Yes, so it can be a little plus or minus, sir. I can't commit to an exact time. It will be a little plus or minus, okay?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: I will try 5:30.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay, okay, alright.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay, thank you.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay.
segments.speaker: customer
